label: plain_text
text:
54 is the exponential form of 625. Here, 4 is the
exponent/power, and 5 is the base. Exponents of
the form 5n a
are called powers of 5: 51, 5", 53, 54, etc.
2 × 2 × 2 × 2 × 2 × 2 × 2 × 2 × 2 × 2 = 210 = 1024.
Remember the 1024 from earlier? There, it meant
that after every
10 folds, the thickness increased
1024 times.
